name: 印花 | sdy（闪亮）| 2019年卡托维兹锦标赛
nameZh: 印花 | sdy（闪亮）| 2019年卡托维兹锦标赛
collection: 2019年卡托维兹锦标赛竞争组亲笔签名胶囊
collectionZh: 2019年卡托维兹锦标赛竞争组亲笔签名胶囊
descriptionEn: This item commemorates the 2019 IEM Katowice CS:GO Championship. This sticker can be applied to any weapon you own and can be scraped to look more worn. You can scrape the same sticker multiple times, making it a bit more worn each time, until it is removed from the weapon.This foil sticker was autographed by professional player Viktor Orudzhev playing for Team Spirit at Katowice 2019. 50% of the proceeds from the sale of this sticker support the included players and organizations.
descriptionZh: 该物品用于纪念 2019 年 IEM 卡托维兹 CS:GO 锦标赛。 这张印花可以应用在您所拥有的任何武器上，您也可以刮掉它，使其显得更为老旧。您可以多次刮除同一张印花，刮得次数越多，磨损程度越大。直到您将其完全从武器上刮去为止。这张闪亮印花由2019年卡托维兹锦标赛中 Team Spirit 战队的职业选手 Viktor Orudzhev 亲笔签名。 销售此印花的 50% 所得部分款项将用于支持该印花的选手和俱乐部。
